Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Series** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][4][5]

The Cleveland Cavaliers won Game 2 on Monday (April 20, 2026) behind **30 points from Donovan Mitchell**, **28 from James Harden**, and **25 from Evan Mobley**, never trailing in the victory and extending their playoff win streak against Toronto to 12 straight games
